title: Limassol, Limassol District — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Limassol, Limassol District: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Limassol is a city in Limassol District with a population of 183,658. Cyprus’s dynamic second city and main port, a cosmopolitan hub with a vibrant marina, a thriving business and tech scene, and a beautiful long seafront promenade.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
